_howto: Atlas dashboard → Workflows → New. Put `name` in the Name box, `graph` in the Graph JSON box, `policy` in the Policy JSON box, Save. Then paste `sample_input` into the run Input box to test. Routing uses role='permit', so first register ONE online worker with role 'permit' (Fleet view) — no worker_id needed.
name: PoC Permit Application
